summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that a single crafted Action Text HTML content attachment crashes Rails 7.2.3's render pipeline with `ActionView::Template::Error` when the rich text is rendered.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction pipeline should clone Rails 7.2.3, render a crafted `<action-text-attachment content-type="text/html" ...>` payload, and surface the render-time crash signature from `ActionView::Renderer::AbstractRenderer#merge_prefix_into_object_path`.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned `rails/rails` at `v7.2.3`, built the reproduction image, installed the target bundle, executed the probe, and emitted `ERROR_CLASS=ActionView::Template::Error`, `ERROR_MESSAGE=undefined method `include?' for nil`, `BACKTRACE=/target-repo/actionview/lib/action_view/renderer/abstract_renderer.rb:93:in `merge_prefix_into_object_path'`, followed by `EVOHUNT_SUCCESS actiontext_content_attachment_render_dos`.
verification_method: The host run script builds the reproduction image and runs `verify.sh`, which installs the pinned target bundle, executes `probe.rb`, and requires the exact `EVOHUNT_SUCCESS actiontext_content_attachment_render_dos` proof marker after observing the expected exception class, message shape, and `abstract_renderer.rb:93` backtrace frame.
evidence_produced_by_run: The reproduction emitted `ERROR_CLASS=ActionView::Template::Error` while rendering a single crafted HTML content attachment.
The reproduction emitted `ERROR_MESSAGE=undefined method `include?' for nil`.
The verification helper observed `EVOHUNT_SUCCESS actiontext_content_attachment_render_dos` and `run.sh` exited successfully.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable ref, and mounts that temporary checkout into the container at /target-repo.
